name: Precision Valley Golf and Bike Center LLC
about: Precision Valley Golf & Bike Center LLC is a dual-use facility located in Hays, Kansas, offering both a comprehensive golf pro shop and a bike shop. Established in 2006, the center provides retail services, club fitting, and equipment sales for golfers and cyclists. While the physical location features a retail environment, their website explicitly promotes indoor activities including 'GOLF SIMULATORS,' indicating that simulation is a core offering for play, practice, and fitting. The venue is designed to serve the Western Kansas community with a focus on both traditional and modern golf technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive retail pro shop with major golf club brands
Indoor golf simulator access for year-round play and practice
Club fitting services and trade-in options for equipment upgrades

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food and drink service available via a dedicated menu section.
No mention of an alcohol bar or BYOB policy is found on the site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you are not required to bring your own clubs. The venue offers club rentals and provides used clubs for purchase, fitting services, and the ability to trade in old clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified. However, the venue has an on-site food and drink menu available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The duration for playing a full 18 holes on a simulator is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding kid-friendly features, policies, or activities on the website.
